name: businessmap
description: MCP server for Businessmap Kanbanize, exposing tools for managing business entities like boards, cards, and columns, facilitating LLM interaction.

tools.name: get-api-limits
tools.description: Get the hourly and minutely limits for the api requests

tools.name: get-boards
tools.description: Get a list of boards

tools.name: get-board
tools.description: Get the details of a single board

tools.name: get-columns
tools.description: Get a list of the columns in a specified board.

tools.name: get-column
tools.description: Get the details of a single column

tools.name: create-column
tools.description: Create a column in a board

tools.name: update-column
tools.description: Update an existing column

tools.name: delete-column
tools.description: Delete a column from a board

tools.name: get-lanes
tools.description: Get a list of lanes in a specified board

tools.name: get-lane
tools.description: Get the details of a single lane

tools.name: create-lane
tools.description: Create a lane

tools.name: update-lane
tools.description: Update an existing lane

tools.name: delete-lane
tools.description: Delete a lane

tools.name: get-workspaces
tools.description: Get a list of workspaces

tools.name: get-workspace
tools.description: Get the details of a single workspace

tools.name: create-workspace
tools.description: Create a new workspace

tools.name: update-workspace
tools.description: Update an existing workspace

tools.name: get-user
tools.description: Get the details of a single user

tools.name: get-me
tools.description: Get the details of the current logged user

tools.name: get-card
tools.description: Get the details of a single card

tools.name: get-cards
tools.description: Get a list of cards matching some optional criteria

tools.name: create-card
tools.description: Create a card

tools.name: update-card
tools.description: Update an existing card

tools.name: delete-card
tools.description: Delete a card

tools.name: create-cards-many
tools.description: Create multiple cards in a single request

tools.name: update-cards-many
tools.description: Update multiple cards in a single request

tools.name: delete-cards-many
tools.description: Delete multiple cards in a single request

tools.name: get-card-comments
tools.description: Get a card's comments

tools.name: get-card-comment
tools.description: Get the details of a comment for a card

tools.name: add-card-comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a card

tools.name: add-formatted-card-comment
tools.description: Add a formatted comment to a card with HTML rich formatting. Accepts HTML content directly. Internally creates a plain text comment first, then immediately updates it with the provided HTML formatting.

tools.name: update-card-comment
tools.description: Update the details of a comment for a card

tools.name: delete-card-comment
tools.description: Delete a comment for a card

tools.name: get-card-co-owners
tools.description: Get a card's co-owners

tools.name: check-card-co-owner
tools.description: Check if a user is a co-owner of a card, the user is a co-owner of the card! Otherwise, you would have gotten a 404 error.

tools.name: add-card-co-owner
tools.description: Add a user as a co-owner of a card

tools.name: remove-card-co-owner
tools.description: Remove a user as a co-owner of a card

tools.name: get-linked-cards
tools.description: Get a list of the cards that are linked to a given card ordered by position.

tools.name: link-child-card
tools.description: Make a card a child of a parent card

tools.name: unlink-child-card
tools.description: Remove the parent-child link between two cards

tools.name: link-parent-card
tools.description: Make a card a parent of a child card

tools.name: unlink-parent-card
tools.description: Remove the parent-child link between two cards

tools.name: get-block-reasons
tools.description: Get the list of enabled block reasons available in the account

tools.name: get-card-block-reason
tools.description: Get the block reason details for a card

tools.name: block-card
tools.description: Block a card with a block reason

tools.name: unblock-card
tools.description: Remove the block from a card

tools.name: get-card-subtasks
tools.description: Get a card's subtasks

tools.name: get-card-subtask
tools.description: Get the details of a subtask for a card

tools.name: add-card-subtask
tools.description: Add a subtask to a card

tools.name: add-formatted-card-subtask
tools.description: Add a formatted subtask to a card with HTML rich formatting. Unlike comments, subtasks accept HTML directly in creation.

tools.name: update-card-subtask
tools.description: Update the details of a subtask for a card

tools.name: update-formatted-card-subtask
tools.description: Update a subtask with HTML rich formatting. Unlike comments, subtasks accept HTML directly in updates.

tools.name: delete-card-subtask
tools.description: Delete a subtask for a card
